recommended_treatment: Apply Metalaxyl + Mancozeb @ 2.5g/L immediately. Repeat every 7 days. Remove and destroy all infected plant parts.
prevention: Use resistant varieties. Avoid overhead irrigation. Maintain plant spacing for air circulation. Remove crop debris after harvest.

recommended_treatment: Spray Mancozeb 75% WP @ 2.5g/L. Remove infected lower leaves. Repeat every 10 days. Apply Azoxystrobin for severe infections.
prevention: Crop rotation every 2-3 years. Use certified disease-free seeds. Avoid wet foliage. Stake plants for air circulation.

recommended_treatment: Apply Propiconazole 25% EC @ 1ml/L or Tebuconazole 25.9% EC @ 1ml/L. Spray 2-3 times at 10-day intervals.
prevention: Plant resistant varieties like HD-2967, WH-1105. Sow on time. Remove volunteer wheat plants. Avoid overhead irrigation.

recommended_treatment: Apply Tricyclazole 75% WP @ 0.6g/L or Azoxystrobin 23% SC @ 1ml/L at max tillering. Repeat after 10 days if needed.
prevention: Use certified blast-resistant varieties. Avoid excess nitrogen fertilizer. Maintain proper plant spacing.

symptoms: white powdery coating on leaf surface
recommended_treatment: Apply Sulphur 80% WP @ 2.5g/L or Hexaconazole 5% EC @ 1ml/L. Repeat every 10 days. Karathane (Dinocap) @ 1ml/L also effective.
prevention: Avoid dense planting. Remove and burn infected debris. Use resistant varieties where available.

symptoms: milky or yellow ooze in morning
recommended_treatment: Spray Copper Oxychloride 50% WP @ 3g/L. Drain and dry field. Avoid fertilizer during outbreak. Streptocycline 100ppm spray.
prevention: Use certified pathogen-free seeds. Treat seeds with Streptocycline 0.5g/L. Avoid high nitrogen. Maintain proper drainage.

recommended_treatment: No direct cure. Remove and destroy infected plants immediately. Control whitefly vector: Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 0.5ml/L or Acetamiprid @ 0.2g/L.
prevention: Use CLCuV-resistant Bt cotton varieties. Monitor for whitefly weekly from emergence. Yellow sticky traps @ 5/acre.

recommended_treatment: No direct cure. Uproot and destroy infected plants. Control whitefly: Thiamethoxam 25 WG @ 0.3g/L. Avoid planting near infected fields.
prevention: Use virus-free certified seeds. Spray Imidacloprid as prophylactic. Avoid late sowing. Remove weed hosts.

symptoms: yellow angular spots on upper leaf
recommended_treatment: Spray Metalaxyl 8% + Mancozeb 64% WP @ 2.5g/L. Seed treatment with Metalaxyl 35 WS @ 6g/kg seed.
prevention: Use resistant varieties. Seed treatment before sowing. Avoid waterlogging. Remove infected plants.

recommended_treatment: No treatment needed. Continue current good agricultural practices and regular crop monitoring.
prevention: Maintain balanced NPK fertilization, proper irrigation schedule, and regular scouting every 7 days.
